/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,vision_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so -o rosidl_generator_py/vision_msgs/vision_msgs_s__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.cpython-310-x86_64-linux-gnu.so CMakeFiles/vision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c__pyext.dir/rosidl_generator_py/vision_msgs/_vision_msgs_s.ep.rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/proxima/vision_msgs/build/vision_msgs/rosidl_generator_py/vision_msgs:/home/proxima/vision_msgs/build/vision_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: rosidl_generator_py/vision_msgs/libvision_msgs__rosidl_generator_py.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpython3.10.so libvision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so libvision_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so libvision_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_cpp.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libfastcdr.so.1.0.29 /opt/ros/humble/lib/librmw.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_fastrtps_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
